title: FLOSS Weekly 655: Open Source and Digital Public Goods
summary:
Deputy Director of Financial Services for the Poor at the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation, Kosta Peric sits with Doc Searls and Dan Lynch for a discussion on digital public goods as well as how the cashless future is being pioneered in Africa and other countries around the world. It's a fascinating discussion on the challenges of being unbanked and poor in developing countries and how big tech and the open source community can help solve these problems to grant more financial inclusion for all on this episode of FLOSS Weekly.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
